Class StreamOffset<K>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.stream.StreamOffset<K>
public final class StreamOffset<K> extends Object
Value object representing a Stream Id with its offset.
Author:
Mark Paluch

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static <K> StreamOffset<K> create(K stream, ReadOffset readOffset)
      Create a StreamOffset given key and ReadOffset.
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream key.
      readOffset - the ReadOffset to use.
      Returns:
      new instance of StreamOffset.

    • latest

      public static <K> StreamOffset<K> latest(K stream)
      Create a StreamOffset given key starting at ReadOffset.latest().
      Type Parameters:
      K -
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream key.
      Returns:
      new instance of StreamOffset.

    • fromStart

      public static <K> StreamOffset<K> fromStart(K stream)
      Create a StreamOffset given stream starting at ReadOffset#from("0-0").
      Type Parameters:
      K -
      Parameters:
      stream - the stream key.
      Returns:
      new instance of StreamOffset.

    • from

      public static <K> StreamOffset<K> from(Record<K,?> reference)
      Create a StreamOffset from the given record id as reference to create the ReadOffset.from(String).
      Type Parameters:
      K -
      Parameters:
      reference - the record to be used as reference point.
      Returns:
      new instance of StreamOffset.
